name: Italian Wedding Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups pastina or other small pasta
1 package (10 oz.) frozen chopped spinach, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the egg, ground beef, bread crumbs, Worcestershire sauce, and garlic powder. Mix well.
2. Shape meatballs using about 1 rounded teaspoon of the meat mixture for each.
3. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the meatballs and cook for 5 to 7 minutes, or until browned on all sides, turning frequently. Drain excess fat.
4. In a large saucepan, bring chicken broth and water to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to low.
5. Add the meatballs, pastina, and cooked spinach to the saucepan. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve hot. Serves 8.
